stepper._comment: OrigamStepper + OrigamStepperItem component tokens. Multi-step progress indicator (Account → Profile → Plan → Confirm) with active/done/pending/error states and optional connectors.

background-color.$description: Background of the stepper root container

color.$description: Default text color of the stepper

padding-block.$description: Block padding of the stepper root

padding-inline.$description: Inline padding of the stepper root

indicator-size.$description: Width and height of the step indicator circle

indicator-border-width.$description: Border width of the step indicator circle

indicator-font-size.$description: Font size of the step number inside the indicator

indicator-font-weight.$description: Font weight of the step number inside the indicator

indicator-bg.$description: Background of the pending step indicator

indicator-color.$description: Foreground of the pending step indicator

indicator-active-bg.$description: Background of the active step indicator

indicator-active-color.$description: Foreground of the active step indicator

indicator-done-bg.$description: Background of the done step indicator

indicator-done-color.$description: Foreground of the done step indicator

indicator-error-bg.$description: Background of the error step indicator

indicator-error-color.$description: Foreground of the error step indicator

title-font-size.$description: Font size of the step title

title-font-weight.$description: Font weight of the step title

subtitle-font-size.$description: Font size of the step subtitle

connector-color-done.$description: Connector line color when the preceding step is done/active
